panel.subtitle: Connect platform accounts so Orbit can publish on your behalf.

add.title: Connect a platform account
add.cookies_hint: Either Cookie-Editor / EditThisCookie JSON array, or a Playwright storageState object. Multi-domain platforms: paste a single combined array.
add.warn_missing_domains: Connected, but cookies for these domains are missing: {{domains}}

row.delete_confirm: Remove account "{{name}}"? Orbit will lose access to it; the underlying social account is unaffected.
row.replaced_warn: Updated, but cookies for these domains are missing: {{domains}}

instructions.step_install: Install Cookie-Editor in your browser (Chrome / Edge / Firefox / Safari).
instructions.step_login: Open the platform login URL and sign in normally — finish 2FA / phone / captcha.
instructions.step_export: Click the Cookie-Editor icon → Export → JSON.
instructions.step_paste: Paste the JSON into the Cookies field below.
instructions.multi_domain_note: For platforms spanning multiple domains (YouTube, X, WeChat Video), export each domain in Cookie-Editor and concatenate the arrays into one before pasting.

confirm.douyin: Your nickname appears top-right of the creator dashboard.
confirm.rednote: "发布笔记" button visible on the dashboard.
confirm.wechat_video: Scan QR with WeChat mobile first, then visit the URL. Avatar visible top-right.
confirm.bilibili: Login at passport.bilibili.com first, then open member URL. UID visible top-right.
confirm.tiktok: Upload UI loads instead of redirecting to login.
confirm.youtube: YouTube Studio dashboard loads. Export from all three domains.
confirm.instagram: Profile feed visible. Must be a Business or Creator account for web publishing.
confirm.facebook: News feed visible. Must be a Page admin to post to a Page.
confirm.x: Home timeline loads. Export from both .x.com and .twitter.com.
